testIdeas.title: Verify sending a contact message successfully
Verify About us video loads and plays

risks: Inconsistent and missing 'alt' attributes for images (e.g., favicons, product image on Product page), reducing accessibility for screen reader users.
Potential color contrast issues on navigation links and footer text due to gradient backgrounds, which might impact readability for users with visual impairments.

Use of 'href="#"' for interactive elements without proper JavaScript handling or `role='button'` which can lead to unexpected scroll behavior or accessibility issues if JavaScript fails or for keyboard users.
Modal accessibility needs explicit verification for proper focus management (tab trapping) and escape key handling to close modals.
Dynamic content loading for the product list on the Home page and items in the Cart page requires robust error handling and loading indicators for a better user experience.
The video player element on the About us modal has `tabindex='-1'`, which might prevent keyboard navigation and control for some users.
